settings.heading: Answers for products, customization, shipping, and support.
settings.text: Use this page as the customer support base before launch. Update it whenever supplier rules or product timelines change.

settings.question: What products can I customize?
settings.answer: Eligible customizable products will show an upload field or customization instructions on the product page.

settings.question: Do you keep inventory?
settings.answer: The store is designed for print-on-demand, so products are usually produced after the order is placed.

settings.question: Can I change an order after placing it?
settings.answer: Changes may only be possible before production starts. Customers should contact support as quickly as possible.

settings.question: Do colors always print exactly like my screen?
settings.answer: Printed colors can vary slightly by material, printer, and screen settings. Add supplier-specific color guidance before launch.

settings.heading: Helpful details in one place.
settings.text: Clear answers reduce abandoned carts and support messages.
